name: push
title: push
description: A directional push between two scenes — both translate together in the same direction, like a camera pan. Onda-original; different from `slide` (only incoming moves) and `depthPush` (adds parallax scale).
pickWhen: the cut should feel like a camera pan — sequential beats, story progression. Use `depth-push` for parallax; `slide` for one-pane.
